samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="WIDTH_AIN" value="16"/>
        <constant name="WIDTH_BIN" value="16"/>
        <constant name="WIDTH_YOUT" value="32"/>
        <constant name="SHIFT_COUNT_MAX" value="17"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="i" width="5" initial_value="0">
            <next_state>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </if>
                <else_if condition="start && i < SHIFT_COUNT_MAX">
                    <set value="i + 1"/>
                </else_if>
                <else>
                    <set value="0"/>
                </else>
            </next_state>
        </register>
        <register id="done_r" width="1" initial_value="0">
            <next_state>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </if>
                <else_if condition="i == SHIFT_COUNT_MAX">
                    <set value="1"/>
                </else_if>
                <else_if condition="i == SHIFT_COUNT_MAX + 1">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </else_if>
            </next_state>
        </register>
        <register id="areg" width="WIDTH_AIN" initial_value="0">
            <next_state>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </if>
                <else_if condition="start">
                    <set value="ain"/>
                </else_if>
            </next_state>
        </register>
        <register id="breg" width="WIDTH_BIN" initial_value="0">
            <next_state>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </if>
                <else_if condition="start">
                    <set value="bin"/>
                </else_if>
            </next_state>
        </register>
        <register id="yout_r" width="WIDTH_YOUT" initial_value="0">
            <next_state>
                <if condition="!rst_n">
                    <set value="0"/>
                </if>
                <else_if condition="start">
                    <if condition="i == 0">
                        <set value="0"/>
                    </if>
                    <else_if condition="i > 0 && i < SHIFT_COUNT_MAX">
                        <if condition="areg[i-1] == 1'b1">
                            <set value="yout_r + (breg << (i-1))"/>
                        </if>
                    </else_if>
                </else_if>
            </next_state>
        </register>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        On every positive edge of the clock signal (clk) or the falling edge of the reset signal (rst_n):
        - Update the shift count register (i) based on the start signal.
        - Generate the multiplication completion flag (done_r) based on the shift count register (i).
        - Perform the shift and accumulate operation based on the shift count register (i) and the multiplicand/multiplier registers (areg/breg).
        Output assignment:
        - Assign the product output (yout) the value of the product register (yout_r).
    </implementation>
</module>
```
